title: A New Cultural Scheme
article_text: Our union has a new cultural scheme to connect people. Unfortunately, the initial plan was too brief. We need to demonstrate the strength of our idea. Each chapter of the scheme has a secret goal. Apparently, many members appreciate the contribution of the bird group. We will arrange a payment for the novel project. The trend shows that people want to adopt this idea. We should not burn the waste from the mountain. We will combine our efforts to make it work. I hope we can hide the secret until the final day.

sentences.en: Our union has a new cultural scheme to connect people.
sentences.zh: 我们的工会有一个新的文化计划来连接人们。

words.eng_def: a group of workers who join together to protect their rights
related to the ideas, customs, and art of a group of people
a plan or system for doing something
to join or bring together

sentences.en: Unfortunately, the initial plan was too brief.
sentences.zh: 不幸的是，最初的计划太简短了。

words.eng_def: used to say that something is sad or unlucky
first or at the beginning
short in time or length

sentences.en: We need to demonstrate the strength of our idea.
sentences.zh: 我们需要展示我们想法的力量。

words.eng_def: to show or prove something clearly
the quality of being strong or powerful

sentences.en: Each chapter of the scheme has a secret goal.
sentences.zh: 该计划的每个章节都有一个秘密目标。

words.eng_def: a part of a book or a period of time
a plan or system for doing something
something that is not known or told to others

sentences.en: Apparently, many members appreciate the contribution of the bird group.
sentences.zh: 显然，许多成员赞赏鸟类群体的贡献。

words.eng_def: used to say that something seems to be true
to recognize the value or importance of something
something that you give or do to help something succeed
an animal with feathers and wings that can fly

sentences.en: We will arrange a payment for the novel project.
sentences.zh: 我们将为这个新颖的项目安排付款。

words.eng_def: to plan or organize something
an amount of money that is paid
new and different

sentences.en: The trend shows that people want to adopt this idea.
sentences.zh: 趋势表明人们想要采纳这个想法。

words.eng_def: a general direction of change
to start using something new

sentences.en: We should not burn the waste from the mountain.
sentences.zh: 我们不应该燃烧山上的垃圾。

words.eng_def: to destroy or damage with fire
unwanted materials or things that are not needed
a very high piece of land

sentences.en: We will combine our efforts to make it work.
sentences.zh: 我们将结合我们的努力使其成功。

words.eng_def: to join or mix together

sentences.en: I hope we can hide the secret until the final day.
sentences.zh: 我希望我们能把这个秘密隐藏到最后一天。

words.eng_def: to put something where it cannot be seen or found
something that is not known or told to others

quiz.question_cn: 哪个词的意思是“计划或系统”？
quiz.question_en: Which word means 'a plan or system for doing something'?

image_prompts: A group of people in a union meeting, smiling and discussing a new cultural plan.
A person looking sadly at a very short piece of paper with a plan written on it.
A person showing a strong idea with a big lightbulb above their head, others watching.
An open book with different chapters, and a hidden key symbol next to one chapter.
Many people clapping for a bird that is dropping seeds into a donation box.
A person at a desk arranging money and papers for a new colorful project.
A graph showing an upward trend, with people happily adopting a new idea.
A mountain with trash on it, and a hand stopping a fire from starting.
Two people joining their hands together, with a gear symbol showing teamwork.
A person hiding a key behind their back, with a secret sign on a calendar.
